remote_access_tools: Fake banking apps sent via link
safe_phrases: we will never ask for your OTP
please do not share your PIN with anyone including us
if you are unsure, please visit your nearest branch
we do not ask for remote access to your device
please use our official app or website
you can verify this by calling our official number on the back of your card
we never ask for gift card payments
our officers will never call and ask you to transfer money immediately
please report any suspicious call to cybercrime.gov.in
you have the right to end this call and call back on our registered number
no government agency asks for payment via UPI on phone
we can reschedule this call if you want to verify our identity first
please take your time, there is no rush
you can have a family member or lawyer present
we will send you written communication before any legal action
you will receive an official letter, not just a phone call
our call recording is available for your reference
please do not share screen with anyone over phone
kindly visit the branch personally for KYC updates
all RBI communications are in writing
no court issues arrest orders over phone calls
please call 1930 to report cyber fraud
we do not have emergency accounts to transfer money to
your account can only be frozen by court order not by us calling
income tax notices always come by post or email first
we welcome you to seek legal advice
call our 24/7 helpline to verify any communication
CBI never makes phone calls to announce arrests
if in doubt, hang up and call us back
we have lodged a note that you will verify and call back
